name.description: The DNS record name, e.g. example.com.

ttl.description: Time to live in seconds. A value of 1 indicates automatic TTL.

priority.description: Required for MX, SRV, and URI records. Record priority.

proxied.description: Whether the record is receiving Cloudflare proxy services.

comment.description: A comment about the DNS record.

tags.description: Custom tags for the DNS record.
